description: A graphic on a dark brick-textured background styled as a framed instant-photo. The central photograph is a booking-style portrait of a bald man in a light blue jail uniform against a pale blue backdrop. Handwritten-style caption text below the photo reads AGGRAVATED KIDNAPPING FOR RANSOM X3. A logo at the bottom reads Worst of the Worst with the label Chicago, above a banner with the Department of Homeland Security seal and the word ICE.
notable_text: AGGRAVATED KIDNAPPING FOR RANSOM X3; Worst of the Worst; Chicago; ICE
